props.ChoiceText: A corrupted manuscript cost you time, certainty, and some of your faith in authority.
props.ChoiceBio: A bad copy taught you how much error can hide inside respectable transmission.

0.TransitionText: Because a bad copy taught you how much error can hide inside respectable transmission, error fell hardest on you, and scholarship gave way to hardship.

1.TransitionText: Because a bad copy taught you how much error can hide inside respectable transmission, the lesson made you more careful rather than less learned, and kept you in scholarship.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Scholar, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a bad copy taught you how much error can hide inside respectable transmission., the setback did not end your road, and you remained in Scholar.

1.TransitionText: Because a bad copy taught you how much error can hide inside respectable transmission, accuracy became something others would pay for, and trade pulled at your learned life.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.
